name: Gerik Uuthrakt

sheet.name: Gerik Uuthrakt
sheet.background_story: "I waited in the Desolate Wastes for days, weeks, years. I was drawn there by a mysterious power, preached by G'ulai Mo-addun, but that power has seemed to fade. Not disappear.. but is not there anymore. So there is nothing keeping me there and I left. I have not lost faith, on the contrary. I believe this power still exists, and I believe I am destined to come face to face with The Wildlands. In life or in death."

description: "I waited in the Desolate Wastes for days, weeks, years. I was drawn there by a mysterious power, preached by G'ulai Mo-addun, but that power has seemed to fade. Not disappear.. but is not there anymore. So there is nothing keeping me there and I left. I have not lost faith, on the contrary. I believe this power still exists, and I believe I am destined to come face to face with The Wildlands. In life or in death."
